mapper.sql: c.certificate_id, c.goods_id, c.certificate_no, c.certificate_org, c.certificate_result, c.certificate_img, c.certificate_date, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, c.update_time, g.goods_name
mapper.select:
select
from tb_turquoise_certificate c left join tb_newbee_mall_goods_info g on c.goods_id = g.goods_id where c.is_deleted = 0 order by c.create_time desc

select
from tb_turquoise_certificate c left join tb_newbee_mall_goods_info g on c.goods_id = g.goods_id where c.certificate_id = #{certificateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_turquoise_certificate (goods_id, certificate_no, certificate_org, certificate_result, certificate_img, certificate_date, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) values (#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{certificateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificateOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificateResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificateImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificateDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, now(), now())
mapper.update: update tb_turquoise_certificate set goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, certificate_no = #{certificateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate_org = #{certificateOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate_result = #{certificateResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate_img = #{certificateImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate_date = #{certificateDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = now() where certificate_id = #{certificateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_turquoise_certificate where is_deleted = 0 and certificate_no like concat('NG', #{dateStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
